signal.description: Dev turn rejected after checkpoint because staged result lacks governed envelope

evidence.value: Project: tusq.dev. Repo: /Users/shivamtiwari.highlevel/VS Code/1008apps/tusq.cloud/tusq.dev-main-merge. agentxchain run_id=run_8734d7a1313a33b2, turn_id=turn_acf70156f6cfa369, role=dev, phase=implementation, escalation_id=hesc_5f3f809bf4ca8dfb. Attempt 1 failed after 1200s/11187 output lines: Subprocess exited code 143 without writing .agentxchain/staging/turn_acf70156f6cfa369/turn-result.json. Attempt 2 completed after 1191s/9320 output lines and created checkpoint afe6222726bf949ee4d5228e20a1012912e015c8 with product/planning/test/doc files changed, but AgentXchain rejected with: staged result missing minimum governed envelope (schema_version + identity + lifecycle fields). The rejected payload at .agentxchain/dispatch/rejected/turn_acf70156f6cfa369-attempt-2-2026-05-02T04-28-26-021Z.json contains a useful completed result with run_id, turn_id, role, status, phase_transition_request, summary, verification/test_results, and files_changed, but lacks the newer governed envelope fields. This blocks an otherwise valid dev checkpoint and requires human recovery.
